name: All-American Barbecue Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, cook beef and onion until the meat is browned and the onion is tender.
2. Drain the excess fat.
3. Combine catsup, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, sugar, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
4. Stir the mixture into the beef.
5. Heat through.
6. Serve on buns.
